---
id: secret-value-get
title: "Get the value of an (unprotected) application secrets"
description: "Get the value of an (unprotected) application secrets. Requires administrator level privileges to the app."
sidebar_label: "Get the value of an (unprotected) application secrets"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the value of an (unprotected) application secrets"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/secrets/{secret-name}/value"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

:::caution[deprecated]

This endpoint has been deprecated and may be replaced or removed in future versions of the API.

:::

Get the value of an (unprotected) application secrets. Requires administrator level privileges to the app.
